name: warmup_walk
_comment: Straight horizontal walk. Single flat piece fills the floor between miner and goal.

name: short_climb
_comment: One step up. Solver must orient a stair piece so the miner can ascend.

name: bridged_gap
_comment: Central tower obstructs the ground path. Bridge across at y=1 with the tower acting as the middle support.

name: double_stair_ascent
_comment: Climb two levels using two stair pieces chained vertically. Requires a flat platform between the stairs.

name: tall_summit
_comment: Tall climb with a mid-level pillar tower acting as a free support. Inventory kept small to keep search tractable.
